services.title: Contract Lifecycle Intelligence
services.description: AI contract lifecycle management: extract key clauses & dates, auto-flag risk, calculate renewal windows, benchmark against market terms, and track amendments across 200+ variants.
features: Clause extraction / risk flagging against 200+ contract type templates
Auto renewal calendar + amendment tracker + approval chain per contract
Benchmark pricing / T&Cs against market medians in your industry
Obligation tracker — reminders 90 / 30 / 7 days pre-renewal
benefits: Cut contract review time 75% — key dates & obligations surface in seconds
Never miss a renewal window — proactive calendar alerts 3 months ahead
Negotiation leverage — benchmark against anonymised peer data
Audit trail — every change, version, and approval timestamped immutably

services.title: Fintech Fraud Graph
services.description: Real-time fraud detection as a knowledge graph: entity resolution across accounts/IP/device/card fingerprints; ML scoring per transaction in <15ms; SAR report auto-drafting.
features: Entity resolution graph (accounts, IPs, devices, cards, emails)
Real-time ML scoring per transaction <15ms — ops_team alert threshold auto-tuned
SAR / CTR auto-draft for regulators with supporting evidence chain
Global rule engine — jurisdictions, card schemes, instant-payment schemes
benefits: Detect synthetic-identity fraud 30–60 days earlier than rule-only systems
Reduce false positives 40%+ with graph-based entity relationships
Auto-generated SAR reports cut compliance team review time 80%
Edge scoring <15ms means no user-facing checkout delay

services.title: Cross-Lingual Meeting Bridge
services.description: Multi-language meeting platform with real-time speech translation + live captions + bilingual transcript + cultural nuance annotations — 40+ languages including dialects and regional variants.
features: Real-time in-meeting simultaneous interpretation 40+ languages/dialects
Live captions + word-level timestamped bilingual transcript
Cultural-adaptation annotations — politeness norms, idiom equivalents
Silent-watch mode for spectator attendees & executive summary auto-gen
benefits: Run one meeting, serve every team — no interpreter booking delays
Full mixed-language participation without manual switching
Cultural nuance layer reduces post-meeting misalignment
Transcripts indexed in knowledge base — searchable forever

services.title: Sustainable Supply Chain Radar
services.description: Supply-chain ESG tracking: carbon intensity per supplier tier, green-alternative sourcing suggestions, Scope 3 emissions quantification, regulatory compliance dashboard (CSRD, CBAM).
features: Supplier-scope carbon database — tier-1 to tier-n scope 3 quantification
Green-alternative sourcing score — compares local, recycled, certified alternatives
CSRD / CBAM / EU Deforestation Regulation compliance report pre-baked
Regulatory penalty simulator — project cost of non-compliance by scenario
benefits: Turn Scope 3 from a spreadsheet nightmare into a live dashboard
Find greener options with cost-impact trade-off analysis in one click
Regulatory reports auto-populated from data — 80% reduction in manual hours
Penalty simulator shows C-suite the 'cost of doing nothing' before filing

services.title: Predictive Maintenance Advisor
services.description: Asset failure prediction via sensor fusion + LLM explainability: when to replace, cost model, vendor recommendation, HSE risk assessment — all in plain language for maintenance managers.
features: Multimodal sensor fusion (vibration, thermal, acoustic, current)
Remaining-Useful-Life (RUL) distribution + 3-level severity flag per asset
Plain-English root-cause narration with specific part + vendor suggestion
HSE risk layer — safety impact assessed before maintenance is scheduled
benefits: Predict failures 14–90 days out with 85%+ accuracy
No more premature or surprise downtime interruptions
Root-cause narrative translates ML output for maintenance crews
HSE layer ensures maintenance decisions don't create safety incidents

services.title: Knowledge Graph Search Engine
services.description: Turn siloed docs, databases, and APIs into one semantic knowledge graph: entity/relation extraction, entity disambiguation, natural language query rewriting, ranked results with source citations.
features: Multi-source entity/relation extractor (PDF, Notion, Slack, DB schemas, API specs)
Entity disambiguation graph + canonical identity store
NL query rewriter — translates 'who reported this bug?' into graph query
Cited results — every answer has primary-source footnote + timestamp
benefits: Team finds answers in <5 seconds instead of 6 hours of searching
Single answer surface across 50+ disconnected tools and silos
Graph context prevents hallucinations — every claim is source-cited
Automated crawl keeps knowledge base current without manual curation

services.title: API Management & API Gateway
services.description: Full API lifecycle management: gateway (auth, rate-limit, circuit-breaker), developer portal, analytics, and monetisation. Supports REST, GraphQL, and gRPC with OpenAPI spec auto-discovery and runtime validation.
features: Unified gateway: REST, GraphQL, and gRPC with schema registry per protocol
Developer portal: auto-generated OpenAPI documentation, try-it console, SDK
Rate-limits, circuit-breaker, and auto-rediscovery for %02D second latency
Usage analytics: per-tenant/method status-code breakdown + monetisation rules
benefits: One gateway for all your APIs — REST, GraphQL, and gRPC unified
Developer portal cuts onboarding time from 2 weeks to 30 minutes
Monetise APIs without writing a single billing rule
Built-in security: OAuth2/OIDC, mTLS, JWT claims context injection

services.title: Code Quality & Pre-merge Automation
services.description: Pre-merge quality gate: static analysis (SAST), dependency vulnerability checks, trunk-based branching, automated PR reviewer, quality-score per PR, and merge-blocking on regressions.
features: SAST + secret-scan + dependency-audit at every PR — merges blocked on fail
Multi-language: TypeScript, Python, Go, Rust, Java — 25+ ecosystems
Automated PR reviewer: 1st-pass inline comments before human review
Quality score: maintainability index + cognitive complexity trend
benefits: Catch security vulns pre-merge — no post-release CVEs
Automated comment reduces human review burden 40–60%
Quality score surface shows team health trend at a glance
Branch protection rules enforced — never merge to main without green gate

services.title: Cloud Cost Management Platform
services.description: Multi-cloud cost intelligence: bill-ingestion for AWS/GCP/Azure/OCI, resource-to-cost mapping, budget alerts, rightsize recommendations, and chargeback/group-by cost allocation.
features: Universal billing ingest — AWS CUR / GCP / Azure Cost Mgmt / Oracle OCI
Resource cost attribution, tag-based and resource-level granularity
Idle resource detector, right-sizing recommendations, prepaid commitment tracker
Budget alerts + chargeback dashboard — tenancy and team-level drill-down
benefits: Average 15–25% cloud cost reduction in first 30 days
Complete cost visibility — no more billing silos per provider
Chargeback/recharge passes financial audit without a spreadsheet debate
ROP + reserved-instance tracker finds orphaned commitment coverage

services.title: Zero Trust Network Access (ZTNA)
services.description: Identity-first ZTNA platform: mTLS connections, device posture checks before access, micro-perimeters per app with geo/IP context, session hijack detection, and audit log per grant.
features: Device health checks (OS patched, disk encrypted, EDR active) before app access
Geo + context-based dynamic policies per app/environment
Session-hijack detection in real-time with instant token revocation
Immutable audit log per grant decision for SOC/GRC/reporting
benefits: Never expose a service to the internet — only by authenticated identity
SOC-ready audit log: every access grant/rejection timestamped and indexed
Data exfiltration risk drops 90%+ with micro-perimeters vs VPN broadcast
Session-hijack fingerprinting catches stolen tokens in real-time

services.title: Industrial IoT Edge Gateway
services.description: OT/IT edge gateway for manufacturing, energy, and logistics: Modbus/OPC-UA/SCADA protocol decode, TLS, local edge inference, air-gapped monitoring, edge-file backup — no cloud required for operation.
features: Industrial protocol adapters: Modbus TCP/RTU, OPC-UA, PROFINET, SCADA historians
TLS + VPN mesh — communication encrypted end-to-end with no cloud relay
Local edge inference — computer-vision/sensor models run on-device
Air-gapped monitor + edge file backup to local NAS or tape store
benefits: OT/IT convergence without putting unsafe PLC protocols on the internet
Full protocol compatibility — no custom SCADA rewrite required
Edge inference sub-30ms means no cloud round-trip latency for control loop
Auditable standalone operation for air-gapped security zones

services.title: AIOps Incident Intelligence Platform
services.description: Unified observability & AIOps: metric/log/trace correlation, anomaly detection, root-cause inference, and auto-remediation playbook execution across Kubernetes, VMs, serverless, and databases.
features: Log / metric / trace / event correlation with open standards (OpenTelemetry)
AI anomaly detection — no rule-writing required; adapts to your baseline
Root-cause inference ranked by evidence — suggests fix + playbook per incident
Auto-remediation playbook execution — safe, bounded, reversible actions
benefits: MTTR drops 60–80% — incidents triaged and remediated in minutes not hours
No rule-maintenance burden — anomaly detection self-calibrates per service
Auto-remediation handles 50–85% of incidents before paging a human
Single observability surface — no more jumping between 7 dashboards

services.title: Kubernetes GitOps Continuous Deployment
services.description: Kubernetes GitOps with ArgoCD/Flux: declarative manifests, per-environment state diffs, drift detection, promotion pipelines, image policy (admission webhook), and OIDC-native RBAC.
features: GitOps reconcile loop — every k8s resource in the repo, diff vs live state shown
Per-environment manifest overlays: dev, staging, prod without duplicate configs
Drift detector — alert + auto-reconcile within 60 seconds when config diverges
Image policy admission webhook + OIDC-native RBAC per env and namespace
benefits: Declarative k8s configs = no more 'it works on my cluster' incidents
Drift detector actively repairs — no manual kubectl diff required k8s
Promotion pipeline = one-button dev-to-prod with audit history
Image policy webhook blocks unapproved images at admission time

services.title: Serverless API Platform
services.description: Deploy serverless API endpoints in one Git push: auto-scaling functions, multi-region deploy, Lambda@Edge, managed auth, observability, and pay-per-request pricing with built-in rate limiting.
features: Auto-scaling to 0 and burst to millions of req/s per endpoint
Multi-region deploy from a single config — active-active failover per endpoint
Managed auth + rate limiting + request signing per route without boilerplate
OpenAPI + observability dashboards per function — total cost per request visible
benefits: No servers to provision or patch — zero ops for stateless workloads
Scale to millions of requests per second without capacity planning
Built-in auth and rate-limiting replaces 200 lines of middleware code
Real cost tracking per request helps set SMART pricing for SaaS

services.title: Data Lakehouse Platform
services.description: Unified data lakehouse: ingest CSV/JSON/Parquet/Stream, implement ACID semantics with Delta-Native engine, SQL query with mesh cardinality optimiser, BI tool connectors, and schema enforcement.
features: Open-table format ACID engine (Delta Lake / Iceberg / Hudi)
SQL front-end plus mesh cardinality optimizer — join lightning-fast
Schema enforcement at write path — no orphan columns in production tables
BI connectors: Looker, Grafana, Metabase, Tableau ODBC — no ETL layer
benefits: One lake, one engine — replace data warehouse + lake silos with one system
SQL on raw data — no schema brittle upfront when every-case is unknown
Schema enforcement prevents schema-drift breaking production dashboards
Join optimizer means 200-table joins run in seconds, not hours

services.title: Hybrid & Multi-Cloud Networking
services.description: Multi-cloud network fabric: hub-and-spoke VPC peering, VPN-less private link, transcontinental BGP route optimisation, WAF+IDS inline, cost-based egress routing, centralised network observability across clouds.
features: Private-link overlay across AWS/GCP/Azure/OCI with zero encryption at rest
BGP route optimisation — transcontinental failover with 30-second cutover
Centralised firewall/IDS/WAF as inline service without east-west hop cost
Egress cost routing — cheap-copy data over least-cost soft-link per cloud
benefits: Single network fabric — manage AWS, GCP, Azure as one logical network
Private link = no internet transit between clouds — revenue-speed latency
Cost routing reduces cross-cloud egress bill up to 60%
Zero-day failover per region tested daily in staging before game-day

services.title: Disaster Recovery Orchestration
services.description: Zero-downtime DR orchestration across regions: continuous async replication, warm-standby spin-up automation, failover runbook execution, DR test automation, and RPO/RTO dashboard with grade SLA.
features: Async cross-region replication — zero-downtime writes at primary region
Warm-standby spin-up from snapshot in 30 s — no manual scripts needed
Failover runbook executor: 47-step runbook, per step human halt available
DR test runner: schedules quarterly DR drills, auto-reports pass/fail
benefits: RPO 5 seconds, RTO 30 seconds for most workloads — no code changes
DR tested quarterly — no more paper-based DR plans in binders
One-click failover — no incident commander typing disaster.command
RTO/RPO dashboard with grade SLA — know your posture 24/7
